title: Emergence of a neopelagic community through the establishment of coastal species on the high seas.
author_string: Haram, Linsey E, Carlton, James T, Centurioni, Luca, Crowley, Mary, Hafner, Jan et al.
abstract: Discoveries of persistent coastal species in the open ocean shift our understanding of biogeographic barriers. Floating plastic debris from pollution now supports a novel sea surface community composed of coastal and oceanic species at sea that might portend significant ecological shifts in the marine environment.
